titleZh: 在中国引入商业判断规则的研究
titleEn: Research on the Introduction of the Business Judgment Rule to China
abstractZh: 围绕中国公司法中董事忠实、勤勉义务的规范缺口，评估商业判断规则能否在中国公司治理中发挥风险分担与效率促进功能。
abstractEn: Analyzes whether and how a business judgment-style model could be adapted in PRC company law to balance managerial discretion with minority protection.
